## LensTemper Packaging Checklist

- [ ] `skills/` and `reviews/` remain packaged together for full LensTemper support.
- [ ] Host support claims match the README support matrix.
- [ ] Cursor and Copilot changes are not described as full support unless fresh-reviewer isolation and artifacts are verified.
- [ ] No `.claude/`, `.codex/`, `.cursor/skills/`, cache, or archive artifacts are included.
- [ ] Package metadata and plugin manifests remain in sync.
